# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: in-body-li-end-tag-missing-li
  tree-builder: in-body-any-other-end-tag-blocked-by-special
